sentences.sentence: Oxytocin is a chemical, a hormone produced in the pituitary gland in the brain.
sentences.translation: 催产素是一种化学物质，是由大脑中的垂体产生的一种激素。

structure.text: Oxytocin
is a chemical
a hormone produced in the pituitary gland in the brain
produced in the pituitary gland in the brain

difficult_points: a hormone 是 a chemical 的同位语，进一步解释催产素的性质。
produced in... 是过去分词短语，修饰 hormone。
in the pituitary gland in the brain 连续两个介词短语说明产生部位。

sentences.sentence: It was through various studies focusing on animals that scientists first became aware of the influence of oxytocin.
sentences.translation: 科学家最初正是通过各种聚焦动物的研究，才意识到催产素的影响。

structure.text: It was through various studies focusing on animals that scientists first became aware of the influence of oxytocin
through various studies focusing on animals
focusing on animals
scientists first became aware of the influence of oxytocin

difficult_points: It was... that... 是强调句，突出科学家通过动物研究认识到催产素作用。
focusing on animals 是现在分词短语，修饰 studies。
became aware of 表示从不了解到意识到。

sentences.sentence: They discovered that it helps reinforce the bonds between prairie voles, which mate for life, and triggers the motherly behaviour that sheep show towards their newborn lambs.
sentences.translation: 他们发现，催产素有助于加强草原田鼠之间的纽带——这种田鼠终身配偶制——并会触发母羊对新生羔羊表现出的母性行为。

structure.text: They
discovered that it helps reinforce the bonds between prairie voles
that it helps reinforce the bonds between prairie voles
which mate for life
and triggers the motherly behaviour that sheep show towards their newborn lambs
that sheep show towards their newborn lambs

difficult_points: that 引导 discovered 的宾语从句，it 指 oxytocin。
helps reinforce 和 triggers 是宾语从句中的并列谓语。
which mate for life 修饰 prairie voles，解释这种动物的配偶关系。
that sheep show... 修饰 motherly behaviour。

sentences.sentence: It is also released by women in childbirth, strengthening the attachment between mother and baby.
sentences.translation: 女性分娩时也会释放催产素，从而加强母亲和婴儿之间的依恋关系。

structure.text: It
is also released by women in childbirth
by women in childbirth
strengthening the attachment between mother and baby

difficult_points: It 指催产素，is released 是被动语态。
in childbirth 说明催产素释放的情境。
strengthening... 是现在分词结果状语，说明释放催产素产生的效果。

sentences.sentence: Few chemicals have as positive a reputation as oxytocin, which is sometimes referred to as the 'love hormone'.
sentences.translation: 很少有化学物质像催产素一样享有如此正面的名声，它有时被称为“爱之激素”。

structure.text: Few chemicals
have as positive a reputation as oxytocin
which is sometimes referred to as the 'love hormone'

difficult_points: Few chemicals have as... as... 表示很少有化学物质能达到同等正面声誉。
which 引导非限制性定语从句，补充说明 oxytocin。
is referred to as 是被动表达，表示“被称作”。

sentences.sentence: One sniff of it can, it is claimed, make a person more trusting, empathetic, generous and cooperative.
sentences.translation: 据称，只要吸入一点催产素，就能让一个人变得更信任他人、更有同理心、更慷慨，也更愿意合作。

structure.text: One sniff of it
can, it is claimed, make a person more trusting, empathetic, generous and cooperative
it is claimed
more trusting, empathetic, generous and cooperative

difficult_points: One sniff of it 作主语，it 指催产素。
it is claimed 是插入语，提示这是某种声称而非作者直接断言。
make a person more... 使用 make + 宾语 + 宾补结构。
四个形容词并列，描述被声称增强的社交品质。

sentences.sentence: It is time, however, to revise this wholly optimistic view.
sentences.translation: 然而，是时候修正这种完全乐观的看法了。

structure.text: It is time
however
to revise this wholly optimistic view

difficult_points: however 插入句中，标志作者开始转向批判前面的乐观看法。
It is time to do 是固定句式，表示“该做某事了”。
wholly optimistic view 指把催产素完全看成正面激素的观点。

sentences.sentence: A new wave of studies has shown that its effects vary greatly depending on the person and the circumstances, and it can impact on our social interactions for worse as well as for better.
sentences.translation: 新一波研究已经表明，催产素的效果会因人和情境而大不相同，而且它对我们的社会互动既可能产生负面影响，也可能产生正面影响。

structure.text: A new wave of studies
has shown that its effects vary greatly depending on the person and the circumstances
that its effects vary greatly depending on the person and the circumstances
depending on the person and the circumstances
and it can impact on our social interactions for worse as well as for better

difficult_points: has shown 后接 that 宾语从句，说明新研究的核心发现。
its effects 中 its 指 oxytocin。
depending on... 说明效果变化取决于人和情境。
for worse as well as for better 表示影响可能变坏也可能变好。

expressions.text: for worse as well as for better
expressions.meaning_zh: 既可能变坏也可能变好

sentences.sentence: Oxytocin's role in human behaviour first emerged in 2005.
sentences.translation: 催产素在人类行为中的作用最早在2005年显现出来。

structure.text: Oxytocin's role in human behaviour
first emerged in 2005
in human behaviour

difficult_points: Oxytocin's role 是主语核心，in human behaviour 限定研究领域。
first emerged 表示这一作用首次进入研究视野。
in 2005 给出人类行为研究兴起的时间。

sentences.sentence: In a groundbreaking experiment, Markus Heinrichs and his colleagues at the University of Freiburg, Germany, asked volunteers to do an activity in which they could invest money with an anonymous person who was not guaranteed to be honest.
sentences.translation: 在一项开创性实验中，德国弗赖堡大学的马库斯·海因里希斯及其同事要求志愿者完成一项活动，在活动中他们可以把钱投给一个匿名的人，而这个人并不保证诚实。

structure.text: In a groundbreaking experiment
Markus Heinrichs and his colleagues at the University of Freiburg, Germany
asked volunteers to do an activity
in which they could invest money with an anonymous person
who was not guaranteed to be honest

difficult_points: In a groundbreaking experiment 是句首状语，突出实验的开创性。
at the University of Freiburg, Germany 修饰 his colleagues，说明机构和地点。
in which 引导定语从句，修饰 an activity。
who was not guaranteed to be honest 修饰 an anonymous person，说明投资对象存在信任风险。

expressions.meaning_zh: 把钱投给；与……进行投资互动

sentences.sentence: The team found that participants who had sniffed oxytocin via a nasal spray beforehand invested more money than those who received a placebo instead.
sentences.translation: 研究团队发现，事先通过鼻喷剂吸入催产素的参与者，比那些接受安慰剂的人投入了更多的钱。

structure.text: The team
found that participants who had sniffed oxytocin via a nasal spray beforehand invested more money
that participants who had sniffed oxytocin via a nasal spray beforehand invested more money than those who received a placebo instead
who had sniffed oxytocin via a nasal spray beforehand
than those who received a placebo instead

difficult_points: found 后接 that 宾语从句，说明实验结果。
who had sniffed... 修饰 participants，限定吸入催产素的组别。
than those... 构成比较，those 指另一组参与者。
placebo 指安慰剂，是对照组所接受的东西。

sentences.sentence: The study was the start of research into the effects of oxytocin on human interactions.
sentences.translation: 这项研究开启了关于催产素对人类互动影响的研究。

structure.text: The study
was the start of research into the effects of oxytocin on human interactions
into the effects of oxytocin on human interactions

difficult_points: The study 指上一句提到的2005年实验。
the start of research into... 表示该研究领域由此开始。
on human interactions 修饰 effects，说明影响的对象。

sentences.sentence: 'For eight years, it was quite a lonesome field,' Heinrichs recalls.
sentences.translation: 海因里希斯回忆说：“八年来，这一直是一个相当孤单的研究领域。”

structure.text: 'For eight years, it was quite a lonesome field,'
For eight years
it was quite a lonesome field
Heinrichs recalls

difficult_points: 引号内是 Heinrichs 的直接引语，后面 Heinrichs recalls 是报道语。
it 指催产素与人类互动研究这一领域。
lonesome field 表示研究者很少、领域较冷清。

sentences.sentence: 'Now, everyone is interested.'
sentences.translation: “现在，所有人都感兴趣了。”

structure.text: 'Now, everyone is interested.'
everyone
is interested

difficult_points: 本句延续上一句的直接引语，形成过去冷清与现在热门的对比。
Now 表示研究领域当前状态的变化。
everyone 是夸张说法，强调关注度显著上升。

sentences.sentence: These follow-up studies have shown that after a sniff of the hormone, people become more charitable, better at reading emotions on others' faces and at communicating constructively in arguments.
sentences.translation: 这些后续研究表明，吸入这种激素后，人们会变得更慈善，更善于读懂他人脸上的情绪，也更善于在争论中进行建设性沟通。

structure.text: These follow-up studies
have shown that after a sniff of the hormone, people become more charitable
that after a sniff of the hormone, people become more charitable, better at reading emotions on others' faces and at communicating constructively in arguments
after a sniff of the hormone
better at reading emotions on others' faces and at communicating constructively in arguments

difficult_points: These follow-up studies 指2005年实验之后的一系列研究。
have shown 后接 that 宾语从句，说明研究结果。
more charitable、better at reading...、at communicating... 是并列结果。
constructively in arguments 表示即使在争论中也能以建设性方式沟通。

sentences.sentence: Together, the results fuelled the view that oxytocin universally enhanced the positive aspects of our social nature.
sentences.translation: 这些结果合在一起助长了一种观点：催产素会普遍增强我们社会天性中的积极方面。

structure.text: Together
the results
fuelled the view
that oxytocin universally enhanced the positive aspects of our social nature

difficult_points: Together 表示这些研究结果合并产生影响。
fuelled the view 是比喻表达，表示推动或强化某种观点。
that 从句解释 the view 的内容。
universally enhanced 表示被认为对所有人都普遍增强积极社会特征。

sentences.sentence: Then, after a few years, contrasting findings began to emerge.
sentences.translation: 随后，几年之后，相反的研究发现开始出现。

structure.text: after a few years
contrasting findings
began to emerge

difficult_points: Then 标志时间推进，并引出研究走向变化。
contrasting findings 指与前面乐观结论相反或不一致的发现。
began to emerge 表示这些证据逐渐出现。

sentences.sentence: Simone Shamay-Tsoory at the University of Haifa, Israel, found that when volunteers played a competitive game, those who inhaled the hormone showed more pleasure when they beat other players, and felt more envy when others won.
sentences.translation: 以色列海法大学的西蒙娜·沙迈-楚里发现，当志愿者玩竞争性游戏时，吸入这种激素的人在击败其他玩家时表现出更多愉悦，而在别人获胜时感到更多嫉妒。

structure.text: Simone Shamay-Tsoory at the University of Haifa, Israel
found that when volunteers played a competitive game
that when volunteers played a competitive game, those who inhaled the hormone showed more pleasure when they beat other players, and felt more envy when others won
when volunteers played a competitive game
those who inhaled the hormone
when they beat other players

difficult_points: found 后接包含多个 when 从句的宾语从句，结构较长。
those who inhaled the hormone 指吸入催产素的志愿者。
showed more pleasure 和 felt more envy 是并列谓语，描述两种负面社交倾向。
when they beat... 与 when others won 分别说明愉悦和嫉妒出现的情境。

sentences.sentence: What's more, administering oxytocin also has sharply contrasting outcomes depending on a person's disposition.
sentences.translation: 此外，施用催产素还会因一个人的性情不同而产生截然相反的结果。

structure.text: administering oxytocin
also has sharply contrasting outcomes
depending on a person's disposition

difficult_points: What's more 用来补充更进一步的证据。
administering oxytocin 是动名词短语作主语。
depending on a person's disposition 说明结果差异取决于个体性情。
sharply contrasting 强调结果差异非常明显。

sentences.sentence: Jennifer Bartz from Mount Sinai School of Medicine, New York, found that it improves people's ability to read emotions, but only if they are not very socially adept to begin with.
sentences.translation: 纽约西奈山医学院的詹妮弗·巴茨发现，催产素能提高人们读懂情绪的能力，但前提是他们一开始并不是很擅长社交。

structure.text: Jennifer Bartz from Mount Sinai School of Medicine, New York
found that it improves people's ability to read emotions
that it improves people's ability to read emotions
but only if they are not very socially adept to begin with
if they are not very socially adept to begin with

difficult_points: it 指催产素，that 从句说明 Bartz 的发现。
but only if 引出限制条件，削弱“催产素提升能力”的普遍性。
socially adept 表示社交上熟练或擅长。
to begin with 指研究开始前或原本的状态。

sentences.sentence: Her research also shows that oxytocin in fact reduces cooperation in subjects who are particularly anxious or sensitive to rejection.
sentences.translation: 她的研究还显示，催产素实际上会降低那些特别焦虑或对拒绝敏感的受试者的合作程度。

structure.text: Her research
also shows that oxytocin in fact reduces cooperation in subjects
that oxytocin in fact reduces cooperation in subjects who are particularly anxious or sensitive to rejection
who are particularly anxious or sensitive to rejection

difficult_points: also shows 表示这仍是 Bartz 研究中的另一项发现。
in fact 强调结果与催产素促进合作的乐观观点相反。
who 引导定语从句，限定 subjects 的类型。
sensitive to rejection 表示对被拒绝尤其敏感。

sentences.sentence: Another discovery is that oxytocin's effects vary depending on who we are interacting with.
sentences.translation: 另一项发现是，催产素的效果会因我们互动对象的不同而变化。

structure.text: Another discovery
is
that oxytocin's effects vary depending on who we are interacting with
depending on who we are interacting with
who we are interacting with

difficult_points: that 引导表语从句，说明 another discovery 的内容。
depending on 后接 who 引导的宾语从句。
who we are interacting with 指社交互动对象。
本句把变量从个人性情转向互动对象。

sentences.sentence: Studies conducted by Carolyn DeClerck of the University of Antwerp, Belgium, revealed that people who had received a dose of oxytocin actually became less cooperative when dealing with complete strangers.
sentences.translation: 比利时安特卫普大学的卡罗琳·德克勒克进行的研究显示，接受过一剂催产素的人在面对完全陌生的人时实际上变得更不合作。

structure.text: Studies conducted by Carolyn DeClerck of the University of Antwerp, Belgium
conducted by Carolyn DeClerck of the University of Antwerp, Belgium
revealed that people who had received a dose of oxytocin actually became less cooperative
who had received a dose of oxytocin
when dealing with complete strangers

difficult_points: conducted by... 是过去分词短语，修饰 Studies。
revealed 后接 that 宾语从句，说明研究发现。
who had received... 修饰 people，限定实验组。
when dealing with complete strangers 说明合作性下降发生的情境。

sentences.sentence: Meanwhile, Carsten De Dreu at the University of Amsterdam in the Netherlands discovered that volunteers given oxytocin showed favouritism: Dutch men became quicker to associate positive words with Dutch names than with foreign ones, for example.
sentences.translation: 与此同时，荷兰阿姆斯特丹大学的卡斯滕·德德鲁发现，服用催产素的志愿者表现出偏袒：例如，荷兰男性会更快地把正面词汇与荷兰名字联系起来，而不是与外国名字联系起来。

structure.text: Carsten De Dreu at the University of Amsterdam in the Netherlands
discovered that volunteers given oxytocin showed favouritism
that volunteers given oxytocin showed favouritism
given oxytocin
Dutch men became quicker to associate positive words with Dutch names than with foreign ones

difficult_points: Meanwhile 表示这是与前一项研究并列的另一项发现。
given oxytocin 是过去分词短语，修饰 volunteers。
冒号后的 Dutch men... 是 favouritism 的具体例子。
than with foreign ones 中 ones 指 names。

expressions.meaning_zh: 把正面词汇与……联系起来

sentences.sentence: According to De Dreu, oxytocin drives people to care for those in their social circles and defend them from outside dangers.
sentences.translation: 德德鲁认为，催产素会驱使人们关心自己社交圈内的人，并保护他们免受外部危险。

structure.text: According to De Dreu
oxytocin
drives people to care for those in their social circles and defend them from outside dangers
to care for those in their social circles and defend them from outside dangers

difficult_points: According to De Dreu 标明观点来源。
drives people to do 表示催产素推动人们采取某种行为。
care for 和 defend 是并列动作。
them 指 those in their social circles。

sentences.sentence: So, it appears that oxytocin strengthens biases, rather than promoting general goodwill, as was previously thought.
sentences.translation: 因此，催产素似乎会强化偏见，而不是像以前认为的那样促进普遍的善意。

structure.text: it appears that oxytocin strengthens biases
that oxytocin strengthens biases
rather than promoting general goodwill
as was previously thought

difficult_points: So 表示这是对前文研究的总结推论。
it appears that... 是谨慎表达，表示“似乎”。
rather than 引出与 strengthens biases 相反的旧观点。
as was previously thought 指之前认为催产素会促进普遍善意。

sentences.sentence: There were signs of these subtleties from the start.
sentences.translation: 这些微妙差异从一开始就有迹象。

structure.text: There were signs of these subtleties
of these subtleties
from the start

difficult_points: There were 引出存在的信息。
these subtleties 指催产素效果受人和情境影响的复杂性。
from the start 表示这种复杂性并非后来才出现。

sentences.sentence: Bartz has recently shown that in almost half of the existing research results, oxytocin influenced only certain individuals or in certain circumstances.
sentences.translation: 巴茨最近表明，在现有研究结果中，几乎有一半显示催产素只影响某些个体或只在某些情境下产生影响。

structure.text: Bartz
has recently shown that in almost half of the existing research results
that in almost half of the existing research results, oxytocin influenced only certain individuals or in certain circumstances
in almost half of the existing research results
only certain individuals or in certain circumstances

difficult_points: has recently shown 使用现在完成时，强调近期研究对当前理解的影响。
that 引导 shown 的宾语从句。
in almost half... 是从句中的范围状语。
only certain individuals or in certain circumstances 强调催产素作用并非普遍。

sentences.sentence: Where once researchers took no notice of such findings, now a more nuanced understanding of oxytocin's effects is propelling investigations down new lines.
sentences.translation: 过去研究人员曾不关注这类发现，而现在，对催产素作用更细致的理解正在推动研究走向新的方向。

structure.text: Where once researchers took no notice of such findings
now a more nuanced understanding of oxytocin's effects
is propelling investigations down new lines

difficult_points: Where once... now... 形成过去与现在的对比。
took no notice of 表示过去研究者忽视这些发现。
a more nuanced understanding 指更能体现复杂差异的理解。
is propelling... 使用现在进行时，强调这种理解正在推动新研究。

sentences.sentence: To Bartz, the key to understanding what the hormone does lies in pinpointing its core function rather than in cataloguing its seemingly endless effects.
sentences.translation: 在巴茨看来，理解这种激素作用的关键在于确定其核心功能，而不是罗列它似乎无穷无尽的效果。

structure.text: To Bartz
the key to understanding what the hormone does
what the hormone does
lies in pinpointing its core function
rather than in cataloguing its seemingly endless effects

difficult_points: To Bartz 表示这是 Bartz 的观点。
the key to understanding... 是主语，what 从句作 understanding 的宾语。
lies in 后接动名词 pinpointing，表示关键所在。
rather than in cataloguing... 与 pinpointing 对比，强调不应只罗列效果。

sentences.sentence: There are several hypotheses which are not mutually exclusive.
sentences.translation: 有几种假说，它们并不相互排斥。

structure.text: There are several hypotheses
which are not mutually exclusive

difficult_points: There are 引出接下来要列举的几种解释。
which 引导定语从句，修饰 hypotheses。
not mutually exclusive 表示这些假说可以同时成立。

sentences.sentence: Oxytocin could help to reduce anxiety and fear.
sentences.translation: 催产素可能有助于减少焦虑和恐惧。

structure.text: Oxytocin
could help to reduce anxiety and fear
to reduce anxiety and fear

difficult_points: could 表示可能性，而不是确定结论。
help to reduce 表示有助于降低某种状态。
anxiety and fear 是并列宾语，概括负面情绪。

sentences.sentence: Or it could simply motivate people to seek out social connections.
sentences.translation: 或者，它可能只是激励人们去寻求社会联系。

structure.text: it
could simply motivate people to seek out social connections
to seek out social connections

difficult_points: Or 表示这是另一种假说。
could simply 表示该解释可能更基础、更简单。
motivate people to do 使用 motivate + 宾语 + 不定式结构。
seek out social connections 指主动寻找社交联系。

sentences.sentence: She believes that oxytocin acts as a chemical spotlight that shines on social clues - a shift in posture, a flicker of the eyes, a dip in the voice - making people more attuned to their social environment.
sentences.translation: 她认为，催产素就像一种化学聚光灯，照亮社交线索——姿势的变化、眼神的一闪、声音的下沉——使人们更能察觉自己的社交环境。

structure.text: She
believes that oxytocin acts as a chemical spotlight
that oxytocin acts as a chemical spotlight that shines on social clues
that shines on social clues
a shift in posture, a flicker of the eyes, a dip in the voice
making people more attuned to their social environment

difficult_points: acts as a chemical spotlight 是比喻，说明催产素会突出社交线索。
that shines on social clues 修饰 spotlight。
破折号中的三个短语具体举例说明 social clues。
making people more attuned... 是结果状语，说明聚焦线索带来的效果。

sentences.sentence: This would explain why it makes us more likely to look others in the eye and improves our ability to identify emotions.
sentences.translation: 这可以解释为什么催产素会让我们更可能直视他人的眼睛，并提高我们识别情绪的能力。

structure.text: This
would explain
why it makes us more likely to look others in the eye and improves our ability to identify emotions
makes us more likely to look others in the eye
improves our ability to identify emotions

difficult_points: This 指上一句的 chemical spotlight 解释。
why 引导 explain 的宾语从句，说明该解释能解释的现象。
makes 和 improves 是 why 从句中的并列谓语。
look others in the eye 是固定表达，表示直视他人眼睛。

sentences.sentence: But it could also make things worse for people who are overly sensitive or prone to interpreting social cues in the worst light.
sentences.translation: 但对那些过度敏感或容易以最负面方式解读社交线索的人来说，它也可能让事情变得更糟。

structure.text: it
could also make things worse for people
who are overly sensitive or prone to interpreting social cues in the worst light
prone to interpreting social cues in the worst light

difficult_points: But 引出 chemical spotlight 机制的负面可能。
make things worse 表示催产素可能加重问题。
who 引导定语从句，限定 people 的类型。
in the worst light 表示以最坏、最负面的方式理解。

sentences.sentence: Perhaps we should not be surprised that the oxytocin story has become more perplexing.
sentences.translation: 也许我们不该对催产素的故事变得更加令人困惑感到惊讶。

structure.text: we
should not be surprised
that the oxytocin story has become more perplexing

difficult_points: Perhaps 表示作者提出一种较温和的判断。
should not be surprised 后接 that 从句，说明不应惊讶的内容。
the oxytocin story 指关于催产素作用的研究叙事。
more perplexing 表示随着研究深入，结论更复杂难解。

sentences.sentence: The hormone is found in everything from octopuses to sheep, and its evolutionary roots stretch back half a billion years.
sentences.translation: 从章鱼到绵羊，各种生物体内都能发现这种激素，而它的进化根源可以追溯到五亿年前。

structure.text: The hormone
is found in everything from octopuses to sheep
and its evolutionary roots stretch back half a billion years
from octopuses to sheep

difficult_points: is found in 是被动语态，表示这种激素存在于多种生物中。
from octopuses to sheep 表示范围很广。
its evolutionary roots 指这种激素的进化来源。
stretch back half a billion years 表示可追溯到非常久远的时间。

sentences.sentence: 'It's a very simple and ancient molecule that has been co-opted for many different functions,' says Sue Carter at the University of Illinois, Chicago, USA.
sentences.translation: 美国芝加哥伊利诺伊大学的苏·卡特说：“它是一种非常简单而古老的分子，已经被借用来承担许多不同功能。”

structure.text: 'It's a very simple and ancient molecule that has been co-opted for many different functions,'
It
It's a very simple and ancient molecule
that has been co-opted for many different functions
says Sue Carter at the University of Illinois, Chicago, USA

difficult_points: 引号内是直接引语，says Sue Carter... 是报道语。
that 引导定语从句，修饰 molecule。
has been co-opted 是现在完成时被动语态，表示这个古老分子被不同系统借用。
for many different functions 表示承担多种功能。

sentences.sentence: 'It affects primitive parts of the brain like the amygdala, so it's going to have many effects on just about everything.'
sentences.translation: “它会影响大脑中像杏仁核这样的原始部位，因此它会对几乎所有事情产生许多影响。”

structure.text: 'It affects primitive parts of the brain like the amygdala, so it's going to have many effects on just about everything.'
It affects primitive parts of the brain like the amygdala
so it's going to have many effects on just about everything

difficult_points: 本句延续 Sue Carter 的直接引语。
like the amygdala 举例说明 primitive parts of the brain。
so 引出因果关系：影响原始脑区，因此会产生广泛影响。
just about everything 是夸张表达，强调影响范围很广。

sentences.sentence: Bartz agrees.
sentences.translation: 巴茨对此表示赞同。

structure.text: Bartz
agrees

difficult_points: 本句简短承接前一位研究者 Sue Carter 的观点。
agrees 表示 Bartz 对催产素作用复杂性的解释持相同看法。

sentences.sentence: 'Oxytocin probably does some very basic things, but once you add our higher-order thinking and social situations, these basic processes could manifest in different ways depending on individual differences and context.'
sentences.translation: “催产素可能做的是一些非常基础的事情，但一旦加入我们的高级思维和社会情境，这些基本过程就可能因个体差异和语境不同而以不同方式表现出来。”

structure.text: 'Oxytocin probably does some very basic things, but once you add our higher-order thinking and social situations, these basic processes could manifest in different ways depending on individual differences and context.'
Oxytocin probably does some very basic things
but once you add our higher-order thinking and social situations
once you add our higher-order thinking and social situations
these basic processes could manifest in different ways depending on individual differences and context

difficult_points: 本句是 Bartz 的直接引语，概括全文关于复杂性的解释。
once 引导时间或条件状语从句，表示一旦加入高级思维和社会情境。
these basic processes 回指催产素所做的 very basic things。
depending on individual differences and context 说明同一基础过程会因个体和语境不同而表现不同。
